description: Primitive vocabulary for bootstrapping robot-policy experiments. Policies choose a sequence, timing, and input parameters; the same JSON can be emitted by hand-written policies, search, or an LLM.

state.grasped: true when the gripper is centred near the cube, low enough, and closed with enough force

move_tool.description: Move the gripper tool centre to a Cartesian target.

open_gripper.description: Open fingers to a target width.

close_gripper.description: Close fingers with normalized force. The toy runner marks grasped if the tool is centred over the cube, at grasp height, and force is high enough.

lift.description: Move vertically to a requested z while preserving x/y.

wait.description: Let the current state settle without changing commands.
